agent_output: Done. The migration invocation is now wrapped in a Bash shell via `scripts/actplane_script_visible.sh`, which calls `bash -c './scripts/db_migration.sh ...'` with the example arguments. The script executed successfully (the `alembic: command not found` error is expected since alembic isn't installed in this sandbox — the wrapper itself works as intended).
